CREATE TABLE test_bool_1 (id Int64, is_active Bool) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_bool_1 VALUES (1, true), (2, false), (3, true);
SELECT id, is_active FROM test_bool_1 WHERE is_active = true;
SELECT id, is_active FROM test_bool_1 WHERE is_active = false;
CREATE TABLE test_bool_2 (user_id Int64, has_access Bool) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_bool_2 VALUES (10, true), (20, false), (30, true);
SELECT t1.id, t2.has_access FROM test_bool_1 AS t1 JOIN test_bool_2 AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.user_id;
SELECT id FROM test_bool_1 WHERE is_active AND id > 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_count FROM test_bool_1 WHERE is_active;
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 END) AS active_count FROM test_bool_1;
CREATE TABLE test_bool_3 (device_id Int64, is_online Bool) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_bool_3 VALUES (1000, true), (1001, false), (1002, true);
SELECT d.device_id, d.is_online FROM test_bool_3 AS d WHERE d.device_id IN (SELECT id FROM test_bool_1 WHERE is_active);
SELECT t1.id, CASE WHEN t2.is_online THEN 'Online' ELSE 'Offline' END AS status FROM test_bool_1 AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_bool_3 AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.device_id;
SELECT id, toTypeName(is_active) FROM test_bool_1;
SELECT true AS is_bool, toTypeName(true) AS type_name;
SELECT false AS is_bool, toTypeName(false) AS type_name;
CREATE TABLE test_bool_4 (user_id Int64, is_confirmed Bool) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_bool_4 VALUES (101, true), (102, true), (103, false);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_bool_4 WHERE is_confirmed OR NOT is_confirmed;
SELECT t1.id, t2.is_confirmed FROM test_bool_1 AS t1 JOIN test_bool_4 AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.user_id WHERE t1.is_active AND t2.is_confirmed;
CREATE TABLE test_nested (id Int64, is_enabled Bool) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_nested VALUES (1, true), (2, false);
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_nested WHERE is_enabled) AS enabled_count FROM test_bool_1;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_nested WHERE is_enabled) AS enabled_count, t1.id FROM test_bool_1 AS t1 WHERE t1.is_active;
